France unveils plan to ditch all fossil fuels by 2050
description: France unveils plan to ditch all fossil fuels by 2050

title: France unveils roadmap to ditch all fossil fuels by 2050
description: France on Tuesday announced a "first of its kind" plan to phase out coal by 2030, oil by 2045 and gas by 2050 during a global conference aimed at breaking reliance on fossil fuels.

title: France unveils plan to ditch all fossil fuels by 2050
description: France on Tuesday announced a “first of its kind” plan to phase out coal by 2030, oil by 2045 and gas by 2050 during a global conference aimed at breaking reliance on fossil fuels.
